# progressHandler

**Instance Property**

A block Photos calls periodically while downloading the video.

## Declaration

```swift
var progressHandler: PHAssetVideoProgressHandler? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If you request a video whose data is not on the local device, and you have enabled downloading with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/isNetworkAccessAllowed] property, Photos calls your block periodically to report progress and to allow you to cancel the download.

## Fetching Video Data from iCloud

- **isNetworkAccessAllowed**: A Boolean value that specifies whether Photos can download the requested video from iCloud.
- **PHAssetVideoProgressHandler**: The signature for a block that Photos calls while downloading asset data from iCloud. Used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/progressHandler] property.
